query:
SELECT CAST((d.detected_at / 3600000) % 24 AS INTEGER) AS "hour_utc!: i64",
                      COUNT(*) AS "count!: i64"
               FROM detections d
               JOIN labels l ON l.id = d.label_id
               WHERE l.scientific_name = $1
                 AND d.confidence >= $2
                 AND l.label_type = 'species'
               GROUP BY CAST((d.detected_at / 3600000) % 24 AS INTEGER)
               ORDER BY 1
